RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT HUDDLE, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is continued to September 5, 2018 for further briefing on the doctrine of imputed knowledge. Brief to be filed by August 13, 2018;
Opposition to be filed by August 24, 2018. The deposition of Krystal Herrington to take place on August 6, 2018; Trial date has been continued from August 27 to October 22, 2018.
